     1→// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     2→//  INIT
     3→// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     4→// V10 FIX: Use DOMContentLoaded instead of 'load' for reliable offline startup.
     5→// The 'load' event waits for ALL external resources (CDN scripts, fonts, etc.)
     6→// which can cause the app to hang on the loading screen when offline.
     7→// DOMContentLoaded fires as soon as the DOM is ready — no CDN dependency.
     8→// ── V11: Embedded default sound data (applause + buzzer) ──
     9→var APPLAUSE_B64_DATA='';
    10→var BUZZER_B64_DATA='';
    11→
    12→/**
    13→ * _initApp - Application initialization entry point
    14→ * Called on DOMContentLoaded (with 5s safety timeout fallback)
    15→ * Steps: loadState -> applyTheme -> applyFontScale -> showLoginView
    16→ * Guard: runs only once via window._appInitialized flag
    17→ * @private
    18→ */
    19→// V10-fix: Global error handler to prevent loading screen hang on JS errors
    20→window.onerror=function(msg,url,line,col,err){
    21→  console.error('[Global Error]',msg,'at line',line,err);
    22→  try{
    23→    var _ls=document.getElementById('loading-screen');
    24→    if(_ls&&_ls.style.display!=='none'){
    25→      _ls.style.display='none';
    26→      // V12-fix: Don't force login if wizard is active or first-run hasn't been checked yet
    27→      var _wizActive=document.getElementById('wizard-overlay')&&document.getElementById('wizard-overlay').classList.contains('active');
    28→      if(!_wizActive&&!window._wizardFirstRunPending){
    29→        try{showView('login');}catch(e){try{ErrorBus.capture(e,"catch#AUTO_208")}catch(_){}}
    30→      }
    31→    }
    32→  }catch(e){try{ErrorBus.capture(e,"catch#AUTO_207")}catch(_){}}
    33→  return false;
    34→};
    35→window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection',function(ev){
    36→  console.error('[Unhandled Rejection]',ev.reason);
    37→  try{
    38→    var _ls=document.getElementById('loading-screen');
    39→    if(_ls&&_ls.style.display!=='none'){
    40→      _ls.style.display='none';
    41→      // V12-fix: Don't force login if wizard is active or first-run hasn't been checked yet
    42→      var _wizActive=document.getElementById('wizard-overlay')&&document.getElementById('wizard-overlay').classList.contains('active');
    43→      if(!_wizActive&&!window._wizardFirstRunPending){
    44→        try{showView('login');}catch(e){try{ErrorBus.capture(e,"catch#AUTO_210")}catch(_){}}
    45→      }
    46→    }
    47→  }catch(e){try{ErrorBus.capture(e,"catch#AUTO_209")}catch(_){}}
    48→});
    49→
    50→// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    51→//  CONFIGURATION WIZARD (معالج الإعداد الأولي)
    52→//  Self-contained module — can be removed without breaking the app
    53→// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    54→const Wizard=(function(){
    55→  'use strict';
    56→
    57→  // ── State ──
    58→  let _currentStep=1;
    59→  let _setupMode='quick'; // 'quick' or 'advanced'
    60→  let _lang='ar';
    61→  let _pwLevel='login'; // 'login'|'admin'|'none'
    62→  let _maxStep=1;
    63→  let _quickQCount=0;
    64→  let _importedData=null;
    65→  let _sampleData=null;
    66→
    67→  // Wizard data to be applied to state.settings
    68→  const data={
    69→    name:I18n.t('wizard.compDefaultName'),
    70→    welcomeMessage:I18n.t('wizard.welcomeDefault'),
    71→    defaultTime:30,
    72→    compMode:'turns',
    73→    hardPoints:2,
    74→    correctPoints:1,
    75→    theme:'space',
    76→    fontScale:100,
    77→    language:'ar',
    78→    password:'1234',
    79→    negativeMarking:false,
    80→    streakBonus:false,
    81→    llFifty:1,llSkip:1,llTime:1,
    82→    pwLevel:'login',
    83→    soloSource:'library',
    84→  };
    85→
    86→  // Quick mode step mapping: only steps 1,2,3 (then skip to 7)
    87→  const QUICK_STEPS=[1,2,3,7];
    88→  const ADVANCED_STEPS=[1,2,3,4,5,6,7];
    89→
    90→  function _getSteps(){return _setupMode==='quick'?QUICK_STEPS:ADVANCED_STEPS;}
    91→
    92→  // ── Localize helper ──
    93→  function t(key,fb){return I18n.t('wizard.'+key)||(fb||key);}
    94→
    95→  // ── Apply i18n to all wizard elements ──
    96→  function _applyI18n(){
    97→    const map={
    98→      'wiz-welcome-title':'welcomeTitle','wiz-welcome-sub':'welcomeSub',
    99→      'wiz-resume-text':'resumeText','wiz-setup-type-label':'setupTypeLabel',
   100→      'wiz-quick-title':'quickTitle','wiz-quick-desc':'quickDesc',
   101→      'wiz-adv-title':'advTitle','wiz-adv-desc':'advDesc',
   102→      'wiz-dont-show-label':'dontShow',
   103→      'wiz-s2-title':'s2Title','wiz-s2-sub':'s2Sub',
   104→      'wiz-mode-comp-name':'modeCompName','wiz-mode-comp-desc':'modeCompDesc',
   105→      'wiz-mode-solo-name':'modeSoloName','wiz-mode-solo-desc':'modeSoloDesc',
   106→      'wiz-mode-prac-name':'modePracName','wiz-mode-prac-desc':'modePracDesc',
   107→      'wiz-solo-source-label':'soloSourceLabel',
   108→      'wiz-solo-lib-btn':'soloLibrary','wiz-solo-import-btn':'soloImport','wiz-solo-custom-btn':'soloCustom',
   109→      'wiz-mode-comp-f1':'mf1','wiz-mode-comp-f2':'mf2','wiz-mode-comp-f3':'mf3',
   110→      'wiz-mode-solo-f1':'sf1','wiz-mode-solo-f2':'sf2','wiz-mode-solo-f3':'sf3',
   111→      'wiz-mode-prac-f1':'pf1','wiz-mode-prac-f2':'pf2','wiz-mode-prac-f3':'pf3',
   112→      'wiz-s3-title':'s3Title','wiz-s3-sub':'s3Sub',
   113→      'wiz-s3-name-label':'compNameLabel','wiz-s3-welcome-label':'welcomeLabel',
   114→      'wiz-s3-timer-label':'timerLabel','wiz-s3-scoring-label':'scoringLabel',
   115→      'wiz-s3-correct-label':'correctLabel','wiz-s3-hard-label':'hardLabel',
   116→      'wiz-s3-neg-label':'negLabel','wiz-s3-streak-label':'streakLabel',
   117→      'wiz-s3-lifelines-label':'lifelinesLabel','wiz-s3-skip-label':'skipLabel',
   118→      'wiz-s3-time-label':'timeLabel','wiz-s3-templates-label':'templatesLabel',
   119→      'wiz-s4-title':'s4Title','wiz-s4-sub':'s4Sub',
   120→      'wiz-s4-theme-label':'themeLabel','wiz-s4-font-label':'fontLabel',
   121→      'wiz-s4-primary-label':'primaryLabel','wiz-s4-secondary-label':'secondaryLabel',
   122→      'wiz-s5-title':'s5Title','wiz-s5-sub':'s5Sub',
   123→      'wiz-s5-level-label':'levelLabel','wiz-s5-pw-label':'pwLabel','wiz-s5-pw2-label':'pw2Label',
   124→      'wiz-pw-login':'pwLogin','wiz-pw-admin':'pwAdmin','wiz-pw-none':'pwNone',
   125→      'wiz-s6-title':'s6Title','wiz-s6-sub':'s6Sub',
   126→      'wiz-drop-text':'dropText','wiz-drop-hint':'dropHint',
   127→      'wiz-s6-sample-label':'sampleLabel',
   128→      'wiz-s6-quick-label':'quickLabel','wiz-s6-add-btn':'addBtn',
   129→      'wiz-prev-qcount-label':'qCountLabel','wiz-prev-cats-label':'catsLabel',
   130→      'wiz-s7-title':'s7Title','wiz-s7-sub':'s7Sub',
   131→      'wiz-s7-export-btn':'exportBtn',
   132→      'wiz-start-btn':'startBtn','wiz-s7-template-label':'templateLabel',
   133→      // Solo library info
   134→      'wiz-solo-lib-title':'soloLibTitle','wiz-solo-lib-stats':'soloLibCats','wiz-solo-lib-cats':'soloLibDesc',
   135→      // Resume buttons
   136→      'wiz-resume-continue':'resumeContinue','wiz-resume-new':'resumeNew',
   137→      // Language label
   138→      'wiz-lang-label':'langLabel',
   139→      // Template buttons
   140→      'wiz-tpl-quick':'templateQuick','wiz-tpl-tv':'templateTv','wiz-tpl-edu':'templateEdu',
   141→      // Sample buttons
   142→      'wiz-sample-general':'sampleGeneral','wiz-sample-science':'sampleScience','wiz-sample-islamic':'sampleIslamic',
   143→    };
   144→    for(const[id,key] of Object.entries(map)){
   145→      const el=document.getElementById(id);
   146→      if(el)el.textContent=t(key);
   147→    }
   148→    // Update nav button text
   149→    const nextBtn=document.getElementById('wiz-btn-next');
   150→    const backBtn=document.getElementById('wiz-btn-back');
   151→    if(nextBtn)nextBtn.textContent=t('nextBtn');
   152→    if(backBtn)backBtn.textContent=t('backBtn');
   153→    // Update pw-mismatch text
   154→    const pwMismatch=document.getElementById('wiz-pw-mismatch');
   155→    if(pwMismatch)pwMismatch.textContent=t('pwMismatch');
   156→    // RTL direction
   157→    const overlay=document.getElementById('wizard-overlay');
   158→    if(overlay){
   159→      overlay.dir=_lang==='ar'?'rtl':'ltr';
   160→      overlay.style.fontFamily=_lang==='ar'?"'Cairo','Tajawal',sans-serif":"'Cairo','Tajawal',sans-serif";
   161→    }
   162→  }
   163→
   164→  // ── Render step dots ──
   165→  function _renderDots(){
   166→    const steps=_getSteps();
   167→    const container=document.getElementById('wiz-step-dots');
   168→    if(!container)return;
   169→    container.innerHTML='';
   170→    const labels=[t('stepWelcome'),t('stepMode'),t('stepSettings'),t('stepTheme'),t('stepProtection'),t('stepQuestions'),t('stepStart')];
   171→    steps.forEach((stepNum,i)=>{
   172→      const dot=document.createElement('div');
   173→      dot.className='wiz-step-dot';
   174→      if(stepNum===_currentStep)dot.classList.add('active');
   175→      else if(stepNum<_currentStep)dot.classList.add('completed');
   176→      dot.innerHTML=`<span class="dot-num">${i+1}</span><span class="dot-check">✓</span>`;
   177→      dot.title=labels[stepNum-1]||'';
   178→      dot.onclick=()=>{if(stepNum<_currentStep)goToStep(stepNum);};
   179→      container.appendChild(dot);
   180→    });
   181→  }
   182→
   183→  // ── Update progress bar ──
   184→  function _updateProgress(){
   185→    const steps=_getSteps();
   186→    const idx=steps.indexOf(_currentStep);
   187→    const pct=steps.length<=1?100:((idx+1)/steps.length)*100;
   188→    const fill=document.getElementById('wiz-progress-fill');
   189→    if(fill)fill.style.width=pct+'%';
   190→  }
   191→
   192→  // ── Show/hide steps ──
   193→  function _showStep(){
   194→    document.querySelectorAll('.wiz-step').forEach(el=>{
   195→      const s=parseInt(el.getAttribute('data-step'));
   196→      el.classList.toggle('active',s===_currentStep);
   197→    });
   198→    _renderDots();
   199→    _updateProgress();
   200→    _updateNavButtons();
   201→    // Scroll to top
   202→    const body=document.getElementById('wiz-body');
   203→    if(body)body.scrollTop=0;
   204→    // Build review on step 7
   205→    if(_currentStep===7)_buildReview();
   206→    // Render saved templates on step 1 and 7
   207→    if(_currentStep===1||_currentStep===7){
   208→      try{_renderSavedTemplates();}catch(e){try{ErrorBus.capture(e,"catch#AUTO_211")}catch(_){}}
   209→      // Also render in welcome page template list
   210→      try{
   211→        var welcomeList=document.getElementById('wiz-saved-templates-welcome');
   212→        var step7List=document.getElementById('wiz-saved-templates-list');
   213→        var templates=[];
   214→        try{var s=localStorage.getItem('quiz_templates');if(s)templates=JSON.parse(s);}catch(e){_logErr(e,'localStorage:readTemplates-wizard')}
   215→        var html=templates.map(function(tpl){
   216→          return '<span class="wiz-saved-template-chip" onclick="Wizard.loadTemplate(\''+tpl.id+'\')">'+tpl.name+'<span class="chip-delete" onclick="event.stopPropagation();Wizard.deleteTemplate(\''+tpl.id+'\')">✕</span></span>';
   217→        }).join('');
   218→        if(welcomeList)welcomeList.innerHTML=html;
   219→        if(step7List)step7List.innerHTML=html;
   220→      }catch(e){try{ErrorBus.capture(e,"catch#AUTO_212")}catch(_){}}
   221→    }
   222→  }
   223→
   224→  // ── Update nav buttons ──
   225→  function _updateNavButtons(){
   226→    const steps=_getSteps();
   227→    const idx=steps.indexOf(_currentStep);
   228→    const backBtn=document.getElementById('wiz-btn-back');
   229→    const nextBtn=document.getElementById('wiz-btn-next');
   230→    if(backBtn)backBtn.style.visibility=idx<=0?'hidden':'visible';
   231→    if(nextBtn){
   232→      if(idx>=steps.length-1){
   233→        nextBtn.style.display='none';
   234→      }else{
   235→        nextBtn.style.display='';
   236→        nextBtn.textContent=t('nextBtn');
   237→      }
   238→    }
   239→  }
   240→
   241→  // ── Navigate to step ──
   242→  function goToStep(stepNum){
   243→    _currentStep=stepNum;
   244→    if(stepNum>_maxStep)_maxStep=stepNum;
   245→    _showStep();
   246→    _autoSaveProgress();
   247→  }
   248→
   249→  // ── Next / Prev ──
   250→  function next(){
   251→    const steps=_getSteps();
   252→    const idx=steps.indexOf(_currentStep);
   253→    if(idx<steps.length-1){
   254→      _currentStep=steps[idx+1];
   255→      if(_currentStep>_maxStep)_maxStep=_currentStep;
   256→      _showStep();
   257→      _autoSaveProgress();
   258→    }
   259→  }
   260→  function prev(){
   261→    const steps=_getSteps();
   262→    const idx=steps.indexOf(_currentStep);
   263→    if(idx>0){
   264→      _currentStep=steps[idx-1];
   265→      _showStep();
   266→    }
   267→  }
   268→
   269→  // ── Language ──
   270→  function setLang(lang){
   271→    _lang=lang;
   272→    data.language=lang;
   273→    document.querySelectorAll('.wiz-lang-btn').forEach(b=>{
   274→      b.classList.toggle('selected',b.getAttribute('data-lang')===lang);
   275→    });
   276→    _applyI18n();
   277→    // Also update the app's I18n (guard to prevent infinite loop)
   278→    try{if(typeof I18n!=='undefined'&&I18n.getCurrentLang()!==lang)I18n.setLang(lang);}catch(e){console.error("[Error]",e);}
   279→  }
   280→
   281→  // ── Setup mode ──
   282→  function setSetupMode(mode){
   283→    _setupMode=mode;
   284→    document.querySelectorAll('.wiz-setup-opt').forEach(o=>{
   285→      o.classList.toggle('selected',o.getAttribute('data-mode')===mode);
   286→    });
   287→    _renderDots();
   288→    _updateProgress();
   289→    _updateNavButtons();
   290→  }
   291→
   292→  // ── Mode selection ──
   293→  function selectMode(mode){
   294→    data.compMode=mode;
   295→    document.querySelectorAll('.wiz-mode-card').forEach(c=>{
   296→      c.classList.toggle('selected',c.getAttribute('data-mode')===mode);
   297→    });
   298→    // Show/hide solo sub-options
   299→    const soloOpts=document.getElementById('wiz-solo-options');
   300→    if(soloOpts)soloOpts.style.display=mode==='solo'?'block':'none';
